final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI design system in classic minimalist tech style, covering web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "经典简约科技" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple Human Interface Guidelines heritage, Dieter Rams industrial design principles, Tesla UI/UX system; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include web Dashboard layout, mobile interface layout, card components, button components, and control components arranged as a cohesive design system
Subject: must include UI components: Dashboard interface, mobile screens, cards, buttons, form controls
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a cool-tech atmosphere with depth and visual hierarchy — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-tech direction with rich layers — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, premium surface treatment — exact finishes are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
